versions.verifyHtml:
kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   nvidia-dra-driver-gpu-25-12-0   true
versions.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: nvidia-dra
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: nvidia-dra-driver-gpu-25-12-0
      name: nvidia-dra-driver-gpu
      namespace: nvidia-dra
      values: |
        nvidia-dra-driver-gpu:
          resources:
            gpus:
              enabled: false

versions.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: nvidia-dra
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo

      namespace: nvidia-dra

          resources:
            gpus:
